merge_notes: Canonical alchemy catalog for crafting, merchants, loot, player inventory, and database seeding.
Condition riders on core ingredients are free thematic riders and do not consume the ingredient rarity budget.
Core-ingredient riders activate only in Poisons and Bombs unless a formula explicitly opts in.
Immunity elixirs share one core formula; the required fourth-slot counteragent sets the condition and minimum brew rarity.
